@KobeissiLetter: BREAKING: Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz announces that a final agreed upon text of a peace deal between the US and Iran has been reached. "Pakistan is now working closely with both sides to finalize the next steps. Peace has never been this close as it is now," he says.
@DeItaone: PAKISTAN PM SHEHBAZ SHARIF ON PEACE DEAL: WORKING CLOSELY WITH US AND IRAN TO FINALIZE NEXT STEPS
@zerohedge: Pakistan PM Sharif: "we can confirm that a final, agreed upon text of the peace deal has been reached and Pakistan is now working closely with both sides to finalize the next steps"
